raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Large buildings are a massive contributor of emissions, causing more than 20 million tons of CO2 per year.",
    "Senate Bill 48 is projected to generate over $35 billion of economic activity in cumulative investment by 2040.",
    "SB 49 utilizes unused land along California's highways to build more solar and transmit clean energy.",
    "Three Southern California counties have the potential to host 960 MW of new solar generation, enough to power 270,000 homes annually.",
    "California is suffering from an unacceptable and unnecessary backlog of interconnections in the electricity distribution system.",
    "The current backlog in distribution improvements can range anywhere from six months to one year in some areas of the state.",
    "The Powering Up California Act aims to hold utilities accountable to accelerate improvements to the electric grid."
  ]
}
```
